reasoning: The informal statement asks to prove associativity of addition on ℤ/nℤ. The Lean statement quantifies over all n : ℕ and all x, y, z : ZMod n and states (x + y) + z = x + (y + z), which is exactly associativity of addition on ZMod n. In Mathlib, ZMod n is the standard formalization of ℤ/nℤ (with ZMod 0 identified with ℤ, which is also associative, so including n = 0 does not create any unfaithfulness). The quantifier structure, hypotheses, types, and conclusion all match the informal statement. No hypotheses are silently added or dropped, and the conclusion is precisely associativity.
